name: Overgrow
ability_effect: When you are below 25% of your max HP your Grass-type attacks deal +3 damage.
ability_description: The Pokémon's Grass-type moves surge with power as it nears defeat.

name: Blaze
ability_effect: When you are below 25% of your max HP your Fire-type attacks deal +3 damage.
ability_description: The Pokémon's Fire-type moves surge with power as it nears defeat.

name: Torrent
ability_effect: When you are below 25% of your max HP your Water-type attacks deal +3 damage.
ability_description: The Pokémon's Water-type moves surge with power as it nears defeat.

name: Swarm
ability_effect: When you are below 25% of your max HP your Bug-type attacks deal +3 damage.
ability_description: The Pokémon's Bug-type moves surge with power as it nears defeat.

name: Guts
ability_effect: When you are afflicted with a status condition your Attack is +2.
ability_description: Afflictions only make this Pokémon fight harder — Attack rises when suffering a status.

name: Flash Fire
ability_effect: When you are hit by a Fire-type attack halve the damage then your next Fire-type attack deals +3 damage.
ability_description: Absorbs incoming fire to boost the next Fire-type move.

name: Water Absorb
ability_effect: When you are hit by a Water-type attack halve the damage after applying weakness and resistance then you heal that much HP instead of taking damage.
ability_description: Converts incoming water attacks into HP recovery.

name: Volt Absorb
ability_effect: When you are hit by an Electric-type attack halve the damage then you regain that much HP instead of taking damage.
ability_description: Converts incoming electric attacks into HP recovery.

name: Static
ability_effect: When you are hit with a melee attack roll 1d4. On a 4 the attacker is Paralyzed.
ability_description: A static charge that may Paralyze attackers who make contact.

name: Compound Eyes
ability_effect: Your attacks that have an Accuracy Check modifier instead have a +2 bonus.
ability_description: Multifaceted eyes greatly improve the Pokémon's accuracy.

name: Tinted Lens
ability_effect: When you use a move that isn't very effective against the target halve the resistance to the damage.
ability_description: Powerful lenses neutralize the foe's resistance to not-very-effective moves.

name: Shield Dust
ability_effect: You cannot be affected by the secondary effects of attacks.
ability_description: A protective dust that blocks all secondary effects of moves.

name: Shed Skin
ability_effect: At the end of each round you may roll 1d4. On a 4 you are cured of one affliction.
ability_description: Occasionally sheds its skin to cure itself of afflictions.

name: Shell Armor
ability_effect: Critical hits against you deal normal damage instead.
ability_description: A hard shell that prevents the foe from landing critical hits.

name: Thick Fat
ability_effect: Fire and Ice-type attacks deal half damage to you before applying weakness.
ability_description: A thick layer of fat insulates against Fire and Ice attacks.

name: Intimidate
ability_effect: When you enter combat all opposing Pokémon have -1 Attack until their next turn.
ability_description: The Pokémon's fearsome presence lowers enemy Attack on entry.

name: Technician
ability_effect: When rolling damage replace any rolled 1s or 2s with 3.
ability_description: Boosts the effectiveness of weaker moves by elevating minimum damage rolls.

name: Synchronize
ability_effect: When you are afflicted with Poison Paralysis or Burn the attacker receives the same affliction.
ability_description: Passes Poison Paralysis or Burn back to whoever inflicted it.

name: Magic Guard
ability_effect: You can only be damaged directly by moves — weather terrain and other passive effects cannot harm you.
ability_description: Only direct attacks can damage this Pokémon — passive damage is ignored.

name: Adaptability
ability_effect: When you use a move that matches one of your types add +3 damage instead of the normal STAB bonus.
ability_description: Amplifies the same-type attack bonus to +3 instead of the standard amount.

name: Run Away
ability_effect: You can always successfully flee from wild Pokémon encounters.
ability_description: Guarantees escape from any wild Pokémon encounter.

name: Cute Charm
ability_effect: Whenever you are hit with a melee attack roll 1d4. On 4 Infatuate the attacker.
ability_description: Charming presence may Infatuate attackers who make contact.

name: Competitive
ability_effect: +2 Special Attack if a foe lowers any of your stats.
ability_description: Sharply boosts Special Attack whenever a foe lowers the Pokémon's stats.

name: Agility Passive
ability_effect: +2 Speed.
ability_description: This Pokémon is naturally quicker than its kind — +2 Speed permanently.

name: Nasty Plot Passive
ability_effect: +1 Special Attack.
ability_description: This Pokémon is scheming — +1 Special Attack permanently.

name: Charm Passive
ability_effect: +1 Defense.
ability_description: This Pokémon's charm grants it better Defense permanently.

name: Pressure
ability_effect: When you are hit with a move the attacker's uses of that move for the day are reduced by 1.
ability_description: Drains the opponent's will — reduces the daily uses of any move that hits.

name: Unnerve
ability_effect: Opponents cannot use held Berries during combat.
ability_description: Unnerves opposing Pokémon so they cannot use their held Berry in battle.

name: Multiscale
ability_effect: When you are at full HP halve the damage of the first hit you take in combat.
ability_description: A mysterious aura that halves the first hit at full HP.

name: Inner Focus
ability_effect: You cannot be Stunned.
ability_description: Deep concentration prevents this Pokémon from being Stunned.

name: Cursed Body
ability_effect: When you are hit by a move roll 1d4. On 4 the attacker can no longer use that move.
ability_description: A haunted body that may disable the move that just struck it.

name: Shadow Tag
ability_effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot flee or be switched out.
ability_description: An eerie shadow that prevents opponents from escaping.

name: No Guard
ability_effect: All attacks you make and all attacks made against you hit automatically skipping the Accuracy Check.
ability_description: Both this Pokémon and its opponents never miss — attacks always land.

name: Steadfast
ability_effect: +1 Speed whenever you are Stunned.
ability_description: Being Stunned hardens the Pokémon's resolve — Speed rises each time.

name: Quick Feet
ability_effect: +2 Speed when afflicted with a status condition.
ability_description: A status condition actually boosts this Pokémon's Speed.

name: Limber
ability_effect: You are immune to Paralysis.
ability_description: A limber body makes this Pokémon completely immune to Paralysis.

name: Immunity
ability_effect: You are immune to Poison and Toxification.
ability_description: A robust immune system prevents all poisoning.

name: Rain Dish
ability_effect: During Rain you recover 1d6 HP at the start of each of your turns.
ability_description: Absorbs rainfall to steadily restore HP in rainy weather.

name: Solar Power
ability_effect: In harsh sunlight your Special Attack is +2 but you lose 1d6 HP each turn.
ability_description: Draws on sunlight for power at the cost of HP each turn.

name: Gluttony
ability_effect: You can use a held Berry when at or below 50% of your max HP instead of 25%.
ability_description: Can eat a held Berry earlier than normal — triggers at 50% HP.

name: Defiant
ability_effect: If a foe lowers any of your stats you have +2 Attack until your lowered stats are returned to normal.
ability_description: A fighting spirit — Attack surges whenever a foe lowers any of the Pokémon's stats.

name: Prankster
ability_effect: Your attacks that do not deal damage on hit have Priority.
ability_description: Gives Priority to status moves by using trickery and speed.

name: Growth
ability_effect: +1 Special Attack.
ability_description: A growth-oriented nature — +1 Special Attack permanently.

name: Power Construct
ability_effect: Zygarde operates as individual cells. 10 cells form 10% form. 100 cells form 50% form. 300 cells form Complete form. Higher forms access all moves of lesser forms.
ability_description: Allows Zygarde to combine cells and change into more powerful forms in combat.

name: Force of Nature
ability_effect: As a free action you may change into your Therian Form or change back into your Incarnate Form.
ability_description: Allows the Forces of Nature legendaries to switch between forms freely.
